ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "goal" INTEGER /* Goal or objective of the game (e.g., number of wins needed) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., board game, card game, puzzle) */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players required for the game */,
  "average_game_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of a game session in minutes */,
  "game_rules" TEXT /* Detailed rules of the game */,
  "game_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brute_force_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being analyzed */,
  "brute_force_complexity" TEXT /* Brute force complexity represented in factorial notation */,
  "computation_time" REAL /* Time taken to compute the brute force metrics in seconds */,
  "space_complexity" TEXT /* Space complexity of the brute force algorithm */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for the computation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_brute_force_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geda_metrics" (
  "geda_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GEDA entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being analyzed */,
  "geda_complexity" TEXT /* GEDA complexity represented in factorial notation or a numeric value */,
  "computation_time" REAL /* Time taken to compute the GEDA metrics in seconds */,
  "space_complexity" TEXT /* Space complexity of the GEDA algorithm */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for the computation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geda_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geda_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geda_plus_metrics" (
  "geda_plus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GEDA+ entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being analyzed */,
  "geda_plus_complexity" TEXT /* GEDA+ complexity represented in factorial notation or specific heuristics */,
  "computation_time" REAL /* Time taken to compute the GEDA+ metrics in seconds */,
  "space_complexity" TEXT /* Space complexity of the GEDA+ algorithm */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used for the computation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geda_plus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geda_plus_metrics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., analyst, developer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the player account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the player logged into the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game played */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player participating in the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date the session took place */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "session_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the session (e.g., win, lose, draw) */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game being analyzed */,
  "strategy_description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy evaluated */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of strategy (e.g., offensive, defensive) */,
  "strategy_effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the strategy on a scale of 0 to 1 */,
  "strategy_source" TEXT /* Source of the strategy (e.g., research paper, expert opinion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategies_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the analysis */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., strategic, tactical) */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player accessing the game */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access (e.g., web, mobile app) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game related to the feedback */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, suggestion) */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1 to 5 stars) */,
  "feedback_response" TEXT /* Response to the feedback from the platform team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
